productTitle: MikroTik CSS610-1Gi-7R-2S+OUT Switch – Outdoor 8x 1G Ethernet, 2x SFP+ 10G
name: MikroTik netPower Lite 7R
title: MikroTik netPower Lite 7R
title_extended: MikroTik CSS610-1Gi-7R-2S+OUT Switch – Outdoor 8x 1G Ethernet, 2x SFP+ 10G
short_description: Outdoor Reverse PoE Switch, 8x PoE Gigabit Ethernet ports, 2x 10G SFP+ Ports, throughput up to 28 Gbps, switching capacity up to 56 Gbps
description: The MikroTik netPower Lite 7R is an innovative outdoor switch that revolutionizes typical GPON base station deployments. As a crucial component of the GPEN concept, it offers ISPs a cost-effective and straightforward solution for delivering internet services to individual apartments. This switch combines the speed of fiber optics with the simplicity of Ethernet technology, all while maintaining the practical aspects of a conventional network setup.

detailed_description.heading: An Outdoor Reverse PoE Switch with Gigabit Ethernet and 10G SFP+ Ports.
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik netPower Lite 7R is an innovative outdoor switch that revolutionizes typical GPON base station deployments. As a crucial component of the GPEN concept, it offers ISPs a cost-effective and straightforward solution for delivering internet services to individual apartments. This switch combines the speed of fiber optics with the simplicity of Ethernet technology, all while maintaining the practical aspects of a conventional network setup.

detailed_description.heading: Power and Connectivity Options
detailed_description.text: One of the standout features of the netPower Lite 7R is its flexible power options. It has seven reverse PoE ports that can draw power from connected clients, which is a significant advantage in reducing overall power infrastructure requirements. The eighth Ethernet port supports passive PoE out, capable of powering another device with the same voltage applied to the unit. Additional power inputs include a DC jack and a 2-pin terminal, both supporting a range of 12-57 V. This flexibility in power sourcing is complemented by a passive cooling system that efficiently manages the device's temperature without additional power consumption. The switch also includes two SFP+ ports to support high-speed fiber connections and a total of eight 10/100/1000 Ethernet ports. This configuration not only enhances connectivity options but also aligns with the needs of modern ISP infrastructure. The power supply is NOT included with the product - it must be purchased separately.

detailed_description.heading: Energy Efficiency and Environmental Responsibility
detailed_description.text: Energy efficiency is another critical aspect of the netPower Lite 7R, with a maximum power consumption of 29 W and just 7 W without attachments. These power specifications represent the switch’s ability to manage energy consumption effectively, which is essential for both operational cost reduction and environmental sustainability. The device's Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF) is approximately 200,000 hours at 25°C, underscoring its reliability and longevity. The netPower Lite 7R is certified under CE, EAC, and ROHS standards, and it has an IP54 rating, which ensures protection against dust ingress and water spray from any direction, further testament to its suitability for outdoor use. It provides ISPs with a scalable, efficient, and robust solution for delivering high-speed internet in various settings, supporting the shift towards more integrated and flexible network infrastructures.
